Center: IAEA Nuclear Data Section, Vienna, Austria
ref: Jour: Nuclear Physics, Section A, Vol.111, p.265 (1968)
title: Elastic scattering of 52 MeV deuterons

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Nuclear Physics, Section A, Vol.111, p.265 (1968)

x4freetext: Al, Ti, Fe, Y, Nb, Rh, Ce, Ta, Au, Pb, Bi, U:
SiO2 and Si (Si: 20 um thick defective surface-
Gas target (10 cm diam., ~1 litre, 500 mmHg) with
slit covered by a havar foil (4.6 mg/cm2 thick).
barrier counters as dE-counters, and NaI(Tl)
angle data were measured by detection of recoils
with Si surface-barrier detectors (2 mm thick) as
were measured by detection of recoil protons with a
Precision of the absolute angle position
relative to the 0 deg symmetry         (+/-0.2 deg)
Total error in the absolute cross
sections mainly due to target thickness determination
(~10% for solid targets, ~6% for gas targets)
On + LV. Recompiled with tabulated data.
